verifiedClaims.claim: Ancient Fruit grows after 28 days and continues to produce every 7 days after maturity.
Starfruit Seeds cost 400g at the Oasis.
Starfruit grows in summer and has a 13-day growth time.
The Keg processes fruit and vegetables into beverages and artisan goods.
Wine is made in a Keg from any fruit.
Wine value is based on fruit value, with normal wine selling for three times the fruit base price before profession or aging modifiers.
The Greenhouse has a 10 by 12 growing area and can grow crops from any season.
The Artisan profession increases artisan goods sell price by 40%.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Mature greenhouse Ancient Fruit wine produces about 277,200g per week.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Derived route estimate: sources verify 120 greenhouse tiles, Ancient Fruit weekly regrowth, wine value, and Artisan modifier, but no source states this complete scenario directly.

unverifiedClaims.claim: 30 Starfruit wine bridge batch produces about 94,500g gross.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Derived estimate: sources verify Starfruit wine value mechanics, but the 30-fruit batch scenario is not directly sourced.

recommendedMoneyGuideChanges.notes: Wiki verified crop timing, greenhouse constraints, Keg/Wine mechanics, and Artisan profession. Profit estimates are derived route math and should not be marked high.

verifiedClaims.claim: Pigs live in Deluxe Barns and produce Truffles.
A mature and fed pig produces Truffles when required conditions are met.
Pigs do not produce Truffles in winter.
Truffle has a base sell value of 625g.
Truffle Oil has a base sell value of 1,065g.
Oil Maker processes Truffle into Truffle Oil.
Gatherer gives a chance to double harvested foraged items and Botanist makes foraged items highest quality.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Ten mature pigs selling iridium truffles directly produces about 3.15M per year.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Derived route estimate: sources verify animal mechanics, truffle values, oil value, and professions, but no source states this full annual model directly.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Direct iridium truffle sales are always preferable to Truffle Oil.
unverifiedClaims.reason: The comparison depends on profession choices, quality assumptions, processing capacity, and labor preference; it should be presented as contextual.

profitEstimates.label: Ten mature pigs, direct iridium truffle sales

recommendedMoneyGuideChanges.notes: Wiki verified pig production constraints, Truffle and Truffle Oil values, Oil Maker processing, and Foraging profession relevance. The annual profit estimate remains a route model.

verifiedClaims.claim: Bee Houses produce Honey every 4 days during valid outdoor seasons and do not produce in winter.
Bee Houses can make flower honey when a grown flower is nearby.
Bee Houses indoors, including in the Greenhouse, do not produce honey.
Honey value depends on nearby flower type.
Fairy Rose Honey has a sell value of 680g.
Fairy Rose is a fall flower crop.
Ginger Island includes the Island Farm location.

unverifiedClaims.claim: A 44 Bee House Fairy Rose array produces about 1.17M per year.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Derived layout estimate: sources verify Bee House cycle and Fairy Rose Honey value, but not this exact layout or annual model.

unverifiedClaims.claim: The exact Bee House flower range/layout should be used for a diagram.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Bee House page verifies nearby flower mechanics, but any specific diagram should be separately checked against tile range rules before publication.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Island Farm page details were directly verified.
unverifiedClaims.reason: The Island Farm extraction failed; Ginger Island page was used instead for island relevance.

recommendedMoneyGuideChanges.notes: Wiki verified Bee House production, flower honey mechanics, Fairy Rose Honey value, and Ginger Island relevance. Layout and yearly profit remain derived estimates.
